partialFailure.title: Some redactions failed — please review manually.
partialFailure.attachmentsSummary: Attachments: {{redacted}}/{{total}} redacted, {{skippedLegalHold}} skipped due to legal hold, {{failed}} failed.
partialFailure.imagingSummary: Imaging: {{redacted}}/{{total}} redacted, {{skippedLegalHold}} skipped due to legal hold, {{failed}} failed.
partialFailure.anonymizeSuccessWithWarning: Patient anonymized, but some attachment/imaging metadata redactions failed (see below).

actions.exportPackageTooltip: ZIP package containing attachments + data + manifest
actions.exportPackageInProgress: An export package is already being generated for this clinic. Please try again shortly.
actions.deletionReviewTooltip: Deletion review preview (dry-run only, nothing is deleted)
actions.deletionReviewError: Failed to load the deletion review preview.

deletionReview.panelTitle: Deletion Review Preview (dry-run only — nothing was deleted)
deletionReview.footnote: Note: this is a dry-run preview, and there is no live/automated deletion endpoint in this release. Unclassified (no administrative-category distinction exists yet) attachments and clinical/imaging data cannot be deleted through this view until a future release adds a lifecycle-category enum and a request-workflow-bound deletion endpoint.

blockers.DRY_RUN_ONLY: This is a dry-run inventory only — no automated deletion endpoint exists in this release. Live deletion requires a future release implementing a lifecycle-category enum and a privacy-request-workflow-bound deletion endpoint.
blockers.ATTACHMENTS_LEGAL_HOLD: {{count}} attachment(s) under legal hold — excluded from any deletion.
blockers.IMAGING_RETENTION_NOT_APPROVED: Clinical/DICOM imaging retention policy not yet legally approved — no imaging deletion permitted (conservative retain by default).
blockers.IMAGING_LEGAL_HOLD: {{count}} imaging image(s) additionally under legal hold via their study.
